name: Abysium Powder
description:
Activate 2 Interact

This faintly glowing powder rapidly induces the symptoms of abysium poisoning.

Saving Throw

Onset 1 minute

Maximum Duration 6 minutes

Stage 1 ] damage and Sickened 1 (1 minute)

Stage 2 ] damage and Sickened 2 (1 minute)

Stage 3 ] damage and Sickened 3 (1 minute)

Craft Requirements abysium worth at least 75 gp.
